title: Another Cabin in the Woods Movie
original_title: Another Cabin in the Woods Movie
overview: In this tongue-in-cheek spoof, horror-savvy characters are trapped in yet another cabin in the woods, where they are forced to navigate murder and red herrings to uncover who will stop at nothing for their twisted happily ever after.
